# ChatGPT

> AI Registry entry [AIR-41](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-41/chatgpt) — status **Sandbox** as of 2026-04-21. Departments: —.

**Category:** Foundation Model / AI Assistant
**Cost per User/Month:** Free; $20 Plus; $200 Pro; Custom Enterprise
**Departments:** TBD

## Overview

OpenAI's flagship AI assistant — most widely known consumer AI globally. Offers conversational AI, document analysis, code generation, image generation (DALL-E), web browsing, plugin ecosystem. At Janus, in Sandbox for evaluation with non-sensitive data. NOT a primary tool — [[claude|Claude]] ([[claude|AIR-10]]) and [[gemini|Gemini]] ([[google-gemini|AIR-5]]) serve as core foundation models.

## Capabilities

* Multi-turn conversations with memory
* GPT-4o, o1 reasoning models
* Code Interpreter (sandboxed Python execution)
* DALL-E image generation
* Real-time web browsing
* File analysis (PDFs, spreadsheets, images)
* Custom GPTs — purpose-built AI assistants
* Canvas for collaborative writing/coding
* Voice mode

## Security & Compliance

* SOC 2 Type II, GDPR
* Team/Enterprise excludes conversations from training
* SSO/SAML on Enterprise
* Free/Plus may use conversations for improvement unless opted out

## Considerations

* Third foundation model adds complexity — clear guidelines needed
* $200/month Pro is expensive for tertiary tool
* Team plan ($25/seat) needed for enterprise data protections
* Custom GPTs differentiator but require investment

*Sandbox. Functional tier.*
